title: Now There's A Coon In The Moon.
content:
There was once an eccentric old coon,
        Who ate dynamite with a spoon,
     But when he got loaded
        The powder exploded--
     And now there's a coon in the moon.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edwin C. Ranck, titled "Now There's A Coon In The Moon.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
